business_ideas.idea: Create premium better-for-you beverage brands targeting health-conscious consumers
Partner with retail buyers and use influencer equity to scale new CPG brands
Build a multi-billion dollar consumer goods portfolio through strategic acquisitions
Create modern soda category positioning healthier alternatives as lifestyle choice
Leverage Cavu fund to scale proven beverage and CPG operators and brands

predictions.text: The biggest brands of the next decade will be ones that upgrade everyday products Americans use
AI and data science will enable personalized medicine and health optimization at scale
Creator economy and influencer marketing will become the primary driver of CPG brand growth
